user_message:
Create an ad for:
Brand: Aesop
Product type: Resurrection hand wash
Tone: refined, natural, minimalist
Visual style: Clean, muted earth tones with simple, elegant packaging emphasizing natural ingredients and understated luxury.
Conceptual technique: sensory experience storytelling
Format: image

brief.objective: To communicate the refined, natural essence of Aesop's Resurrection Hand Wash through a sensory, immersive experience that highlights its natural ingredients and minimalist luxury.
brief.target_audience: Discerning individuals who appreciate high-quality, natural skincare products and value understated elegance and sensory experiences.
brief.visual_style: Clean composition featuring muted earth tones such as soft beige, warm terracotta, and gentle sage green. Simple, elegant packaging prominently displayed with minimal text to emphasize purity and sophistication. Use of natural elements like sprigs of rosemary or citrus fruits subtly incorporated.
brief.conceptual_technique: Sensory experience storytelling - evoke the tactile and aromatic sensations of the hand wash through visual cues, inviting the viewer to imagine the soothing texture and fresh scent.

copy.headline: Awaken Your Senses.
copy.body: Aesop's Resurrection Hand Wash combines natural botanicals with minimalist elegance, transforming a simple ritual into a moment of refined indulgence.

visual_direction.composition: Close-up shot of the Resurrection Hand Wash bottle on a textured stone surface, surrounded by fresh rosemary sprigs and slices of citrus. Soft natural light casting gentle shadows to highlight the matte glass and label. Subtle water droplets on the bottle to convey freshness and hydration.
visual_direction.color_palette: Muted earth tones - warm beige background, deep green from rosemary, pale orange from citrus, complemented by the amber hue of the hand wash liquid.
visual_direction.typography: Minimalist, serif font in dark charcoal for headline and body copy, maintaining elegance and readability.
visual_direction.branding: Aesop logo discreetly placed at the bottom right corner, maintaining balance without overpowering the image.
